templates.title: Flexible date parser — multi format
Format duration — detik ke string
Weekend checker
Hitung hari kerja antara dua tanggal
Tambah hari kerja ke tanggal
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(start, n):
    """Tambah n business days."""
    import datetime
    cur = start
    step = 1 if n >= 0 else -1
    remaining = abs(n)
    one_day = datetime.timedelta(days=step)
    while remaining > 0:
        cur += one_day
        if cur.weekday() < 5:
            remaining -= 1
    return cur

templates.title: Date range generator
templates.description: Yield semua tanggal dari A ke B
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(start, end):
    """Yield date dari start ke end inclusive."""
    import datetime
    cur = start
    step = datetime.timedelta(days=1)
    while cur <= end:
        yield cur
        cur += step
